summary: Full backend + frontend testing of compact employee table redesign and national ID validation. 22/22 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: 7-dot rest day circles, ⋮ dropdown actions, smart account status icons, national ID live validation with API check.

issues: Read-only version (RestDaysBadges) does NOT show emerald 'today' tint — only amber for selected days. The editable RestDaysDots version correctly shows emerald for today. Minor inconsistency when schedule is archived (read-only mode).

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR BUG: EmployeeManagement.jsx line 583: `toast.success(res.data?.message || isAr ? 'تم التحديث' : 'Updated')` — JavaScript operator precedence issue. `||` evaluates before ternary, so expression becomes `(res.data?.message || isAr) ? 'تم التحديث' : 'Updated'`. Since isAr=true always in Arabic UI, the backend's specific success message (e.g., 'تم تفعيل حساب الموظف ✅') is NEVER shown — always shows 'تم التحديث'. Fix: `res.data?.message || (isAr ? 'تم التحديث' : 'Updated')`

AccountStatusIcon for employees WITHOUT national_id renders ShieldOff without data-testid attribute. Minor testability issue — harmless but means account icon can't be selected in automated tests for these employees.

RestDaysBadges (read-only) doesn't implement emerald 'today' dot color — only amber (selected) or slate (unselected). RestDaysDots (editable) correctly shows emerald for today. Behavior is acceptable for read-only view but slightly inconsistent.
action_items: MINOR: Fix toast.success operator precedence bug in EmployeeManagement.jsx line 583 — backend success messages (like '✅ تم تفعيل حساب الموظف') are never displayed in toast
features_verified: ✅ Employee table shows compact 7-dot rest days (circles with letters س ح ن ث ر خ ج)
✅ Rest day dot tooltip shows full Arabic day name on hover (e.g., 'السبت')
✅ Rest day dot toggles between amber (selected) and gray (unselected)
✅ Today's unselected dot shows emerald/green tint in editable mode
✅ Actions column shows single ⋮ button with no text in table cell
✅ ⋮ dropdown (active account): تعديل البيانات, إعادة تعيين PIN, تجميد الحساب مؤقتاً, إنهاء الخدمة, حذف الموظف نهائياً
✅ ⋮ dropdown (pending account): تعديل البيانات, تفعيل الحساب, إنهاء الخدمة, حذف الموظف نهائياً
✅ Account status icon: pending=amber ShieldOff (title: 'معلق — انقر للتفعيل')
✅ Account status icon: active=emerald ShieldCheck (title: 'نشط — انقر للتجميد مؤقتاً')
✅ Reset PIN icon (key) appears only for active/frozen accounts
✅ No account (no national_id): gray ShieldOff without interaction
✅ Status column shows icon-only circles (UserCheck/Coffee/X based on status)
✅ National ID: 5 digits entered → '5 أرقام متبقية' countdown shown
✅ National ID: prefix 3/4/... → 'رقم الهوية يجب أن يبدأ بـ 1 أو 2' error
✅ National ID: valid 10-digit → 'رقم الهوية متاح — سيُنشأ حساب تلقائياً' + green border
✅ National ID: taken → 'رقم الهوية مسجل مسبقاً في النظام' (no department info revealed)
✅ API GET /employees/check-national-id returns {available: bool} only
✅ API returns available:false for invalid format (starts with 3, 9 digits)
✅ API requires authentication (401 without token)
✅ POST /employees: 9-digit national_id → 400 error
✅ POST /employees: starts with 3 → 400 error
✅ POST /employees: duplicate national_id → 400 'مسجل مسبقاً في النظام' (no department)
✅ POST /employees: valid national_id → account_created=true, user_id returned
✅ exclude_emp_id param works for edit mode (own ID considered available)
seed_data_creation: All test employees created during testing were cleaned up (deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compact table redesign (iteration 53) fully verified. Backend 22/22 pass, frontend all features working. Minor toast bug: operator precedence issue in handleAccountAction. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_compact_table_national_id.py. Navigate to /planning?tab=employees to test employee table. Uses DepartmentSettings.jsx which renders EmployeeManagement.jsx as 'employees' tab.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In EmployeeManagement.jsx line 583: `toast.success(res.data?.message || isAr ? 'تم التحديث' : 'Updated')` — JS evaluates `||` before ternary, so condition becomes `(res.data?.message || isAr)` which is always truthy in Arabic UI, always showing 'تم التحديث' regardless of backend message
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Activate/freeze any employee account — toast always shows 'تم التحديث' even though backend returns specific messages like 'تم تفعيل حساب X ✅'
rca_of_issue.severity: MINOR — functional, just loses backend's specific message
